criteria_map: Prod current pointer with immutable refs: satisfied by prod current state using API digest `sha256:249feec8...` and Factory digest `sha256:e6b03e...`.
Prod previous pointer for immediate rollback: satisfied by prod previous state pointing at the prior `4e52e7ea` digest pair.
Current prod promoted from staging-verified `85e79d92`: satisfied by staging run `20260524-100806-main-85e79d9237f1` and prod promotion `20260524-101001-promote-prod-staging-85e79d9237f1`.
Containers match pointer refs: satisfied by Docker inspect `Config.Image` matching current pointer digests.
Health checks pass: satisfied by local/public health outputs.
Dry-run rollback succeeds and does not mutate current: satisfied by rollback dry-run evidence.
Ledger finalization: validation/render/status still needs to run after this check is recorded.
evidence: Release-controller `current_releases` includes prod current commit `85e79d9237f14e95020f7271810dca1de095b407` with immutable API and Factory digest refs.
Release-controller `previous_releases` includes prod previous commit `4e52e7ea8e2f0722be550ce36a19ea8d8cae8a21` with immutable API and Factory digest refs.
Prod rollback dry-run run `20260524-101138-rollback-prod-4e52e7ea8e2f` succeeded, all command steps were skipped, and current pointer was unchanged.
Docker inspect shows `novaic-prod-gateway-1` and `novaic-llm-factory-prod-llm-factory-1` run the same digest refs as the prod current pointer.
Health checks passed for controller, local prod API, local prod Factory, public prod `/health`, and public staging API.
Repo tests passed after the smoke endpoint fix.
execution_map: Result R000 performed the runtime inspection, config correction, baseline promotion, staging promotion, final source config commit, final staging release, final prod promotion, rollback dry-run, and health verification.
No blocking child problem was required.
residual_risk: The public `/api/health` endpoint still returns 401, so external unauthenticated health checks must use `/health` or authenticated API checks. This is documented in the runbook and runtime config.
stress_test: The main failure mode was a false rollback system where prod has only a current pointer. That was avoided by first creating a baseline prod pointer from the existing prod digest pair, then promoting staging. The second promote moved the prior current into `prod` previous, and rollback dry-run proved controller can resolve and plan against it.
C000.summary: The prod enrollment is successful. Prod is now tracked by release-controller with immutable digest current and previous pointers; the current prod deployment is the latest main commit, and rollback can target the previous prod release through controller state.

P000.description: Prod is containerized and healthy, but release-controller state only tracks staging. Prod must become a first-class immutable release namespace: promotion should deploy immutable refs, current/previous pointers should exist, and rollback should be planned from release-controller state rather than from mutable Docker tags.
success_criteria: Prod has a release-controller `current_releases` pointer with namespace `prod` and immutable API/Factory image refs.
Prod has a `previous_releases` pointer so `/v1/rollbacks/prod` has a real target immediately.
The current prod deployment is promoted from the staging-verified commit `4e52e7ea8e2f0722be550ce36a19ea8d8cae8a21` using immutable refs.
Prod API and Factory containers run image refs that match the release-controller prod current pointer.
Prod health checks pass locally and public prod ingress behavior is understood.
A dry-run rollback for prod succeeds and points to the previous immutable prod pointer without mutating current prod.
P000.title: Enroll prod into release-controller immutable promote and rollback pointers

done: Inspected existing prod runtime images and found immutable baseline digests for the old prod deployment.
Updated API-host release-controller runtime config so prod smoke uses `https://api.gradievo.com/health`; `/api/health` is auth-protected and returns 401 publicly.
Restarted release-controller so it loaded the updated smoke URL.
Promoted the existing prod image digest pair as a bootstrap baseline pointer:
Promoted staging commit `4e52e7ea8e2f0722be550ce36a19ea8d8cae8a21` to prod, creating a prod previous pointer.

Fixed `novaic-release-controller/config.sample.json` and `docs/runbooks/deploy.md`, committed `85e79d9237f1 Fix prod release controller smoke endpoint`, waited for staging to publish it, then promoted that staging digest pair to prod.
Verified prod rollback dry-run succeeds and targets the previous prod pointer without mutating current prod.
known_gaps: Public `https://api.gradievo.com/api/health` returns 401 by design under current auth behavior; release-controller prod smoke uses `https://api.gradievo.com/health`, and local app health is verified separately at `127.0.0.1:19999/api/health`.
The local ledger for this runtime operation remains uncommitted to avoid advancing main again after prod was promoted to the latest source commit.
R000.summary: Enrolled prod into the release-controller promote/rollback state model. Prod now has a controller-managed current pointer with immutable digest refs and a previous pointer for immediate rollback. The current prod release is promoted from staging-verified main commit `85e79d9237f14e95020f7271810dca1de095b407`.
verification: Prod current pointer now uses immutable digests:
Prod previous pointer now targets the previous `4e52e7ea` digest pair.
Prod rollback dry-run `20260524-101138-rollback-prod-4e52e7ea8e2f` succeeded, all steps were skipped, and current pointer remained unchanged.
Running prod gateway and prod factory containers have `Config.Image` exactly matching prod current digest refs.
Health checks passed: release-controller local health, prod local API health, prod local Factory health, prod public `/health`, and staging public health.
Tests passed after the config/doc fix: release-controller tests 38/38, release-controller CI guard 6/6, full pytest 11/11, and `bash -n deploy`.

acceptance_criteria: Prod current pointer exists after controller-managed promotion.
Prod previous pointer exists and points at the bootstrap prod baseline.
Prod current images are immutable refs for `sha-4e52e7ea8e2f`.
Prod containers run the current pointer image refs.
`/v1/rollbacks/prod` with `dry_run=true` succeeds, skips execution, and leaves current pointer unchanged.
Health checks pass for controller, prod API, prod Factory, and prod ingress behavior is documented.
assumptions: The staging `4e52e7ea` release is acceptable to promote to prod.
User wants the correct controller-managed path rather than preserving the mutable prod tag runtime.
T000.classification_reason: This is a bounded runtime enrollment: inspect prod, perform controller promotion steps, verify pointers and health, and record any blocker if prod cannot be bootstrapped immutably.
T000.problem_definition: Prod currently runs Dockerized services, but release-controller state has no prod current or previous pointer. Without those pointers, prod deployment is outside the clean promote/rollback control plane.
T000.proposed_solution: First inspect current prod images and state. If current prod images can be represented as immutable digests, bootstrap a prod baseline pointer by promoting the currently running prod image digests. Then promote the staging-verified `4e52e7ea` API and Factory sha-tag images to prod through `/v1/promotions/prod`. Verify prod current and previous pointers, container image refs, health endpoints, and dry-run rollback behavior.
risks: If current prod was deployed from mutable tag without a repo digest, bootstrap baseline may need a temporary immutable tag or direct state seed.
First prod deploy under controller may restart prod services; health gates must pass before closure.
Public `api.gradievo.com/api/health` may require authentication and return 401 while local health is healthy.
T000.title: Promote prod into immutable controller state
T000.verification_plan:
- Query release-controller `/v1/status` before and after promotions.
- Inspect Docker image digests/tags and running prod containers on the API host.
- Call `/v1/promotions/prod` for baseline and current promotion with immutable refs.
- Call `/v1/rollbacks/prod` with `dry_run=true`.
- Curl local prod API/factory and public prod API endpoints.
- Validate/render/status the ledger.
